note: If/then fill logic (authored + derived): conditional-required, attachment/companion-form triggers, value incompatibilities, and value inferences. Warnings-only — evaluated by tools/logic_engine.py at preflight/fill time; nothing here blocks or alters a fill. Not legal advice.

then.attachment: the contract, application, or other writing evidencing the consumer's agreement to the debt

rules.message: A debt buyer must attach the contract/application (or other writing) evidencing the consumer's agreement to the debt.

then.attachment: the bill of sale and each assignment establishing an unbroken chain of title from the original creditor

rules.message: Attach the bill of sale and each assignment establishing an unbroken chain of ownership from the original creditor to the current debt buyer.

then.attachment: each successive assignment (the debt was assigned more than once)

rules.message: The debt was assigned more than once — attach every assignment in the chain, not just the most recent.
CV-287 is usually filed with CR-CV-FM-JV-021 (when attorney filing).
Filing CV-287 requires companion form CV-001.
CV-287 is usually filed with CV-061 (when default judgment).
